_false_positive_note: NOT secrets. Resembles generic-secret rules that key on words like 'token'/'key'/'secret' followed by a string. Here those words are translation keys and the values are UI copy, not credentials.
auth.token.expired: Your session token has expired, please sign in again.
billing.apiKey.label: API key
billing.apiKey.help: Paste the secret key from your provider dashboard here.
errors.secret.missing: A required secret is missing from the configuration.
password.reset.sent: We sent a password reset link to your email address.
